channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Trees are overgrown blocking pavements, 28th June
item.description:
Pavement opposite houses here is blocked by overgrown bushes, overgrown trees and hanging branches. Please cut back so people don’t need to use the road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shed rubbish, 28th June
item.description:
This shed has been here for a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 144B, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds and rubbish behind overgrown shrub, 28th June
item.description:
We have a patch of grass that’s covered in weeds outside 30 28 26 sholden gardens that needs sorting out also a overgrown shrub that needs a trim and on the ground area behind shrub is full of rubbish weeds bellbind and little trees are starting to root that need’s getting before they grow bigger. The whole area needs a thorough clean people are leaving bins out all week and leaving cat bowls out in the public footpath which is causing rodents and foxes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5A, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded carpet on pavement, 28th June
item.description:
A carpet has been dumped on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Grove, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree cut down but not replaced, 28th June
item.description:
A tree was cut down on the side backing on to the tracks near number 81 and a steak left in the ground to support a new tree but no new tree has been planted. Can one be added please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown plants hedges on eastside of Kingswood Drive, 28th June
item.description:
Foliage needs cutting back as hanging over footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Drive, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign old and faded, 28th June
item.description:
Outside 48, see photo, sign is old and faded and needs replacing please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Hayes Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Winkworth billboard sign, 28th June
item.description:
Has been on pavement for several months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Drive, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped van on our street, 28th June
item.description:
Dumped and left for ages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Downs Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded Bus Lane Marking, 28th June
item.description:
Road marking for bus lane has faded

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Green Lanes, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near junction with Hampstead Road on left, 28th June
item.description:
Looks like a sinkhole is appearing in the road. Large dip in road and tarmac disappearing. Saw it when walking from Euston down Drummond street before you get to the traffic lights where Hampstead Road crosses.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 159, Drummond Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole street needs a good clean. Dog poo all on the street and in people’s garden, 28th June
item.description:
From the start of parkholme road off Richmond Road people visiting the Prince George pub get drunk and litter all over the pavement. Just recently one was caught on camera entering someone’s garden and pooing on the porch then covering it up with grass.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parkholme Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brambles encroaching pavement, 28th June
item.description:
Brambles encroaching pavement. Concern people may avoid by going into the road which is narrow already under the bridge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazelmere Rd pedestrian area between Glengall and Prory Pk Roads., 28th June
item.description:
Bags and boxes of rubbish dumped. Looks like it comes from Priory Pk Rd as that's address on box but house number removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: See saw equipment damaged & trip hazard, 28th June
item.description:
See saw has been tapped up out of use for about 2 months. Trip hazard on ground part of star under the round shell swing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflow clothes bin/rubbish on street, 28th June
item.description:
Overflow clothes bin/rubbish on street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on ground all around Zinc House & GP Surgery, 28th June
item.description:
Lots of litter
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 28th June
item.description:
A few weeks ago someone dropped leaflets. There is also other rubbish along path and edge of road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs and black bags on Seal Street E8 at Shacklewell Row, 28th June
item.description:
Hello, please can you remove the dumped chairs and black bags on Seal Street E8 at Shacklewell Row E8. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seal Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not sure if I live in Kew gardens or parkside estate, 28th June
item.description:
You can can the name of the estate to park in the estate. When is the deweeding going to start? This whole estate looks run down and very unkept. What is going on with hackney council and there estate teams the green team where here last week and the estat

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rutland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
